data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the Abandoned Booking Recovery sequence, which includes specific messaging at defined intervals after cart abandonment. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the required messages being sent at the specified times (immediate, 24 hours, and 72 hours later). The absence of any evidence related to these specific messages indicates a gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of messages being sent for abandoned booking recovery as specified in the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
